sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_SESSION ( SESSION_ID CHAR(36) NOT NULL, LOGINCOOKIE VARCHAR(700) NOT NULL, CREATION_TIME DATETIME NOT NULL, LAST_ACCESS_TIME DATETIME NOT NULL, MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL INT NOT NULL, TYPE VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`SESSION_ID`), KEY `IDX_SESSION_LAST_TIME` (`SESSION_ID`, `LAST_ACCESS_TIME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_company_config` ( `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `PROPERTY_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `PROPERTY_VALUE` varchar(2000) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`,`PROPERTY_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_access_ip` ( `IPNO` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `IPADDRESS` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `ACCESS` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'YES', `EXPLANATION` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`IPNO`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_distribution_sub` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `SUB_MAIL` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `SUB_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`SUB_MAIL`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`), CONSTRAINT `FK_distribution_sub` FOREIGN KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`, `USER_NAME`) REFERENCES `jmocha_distribution` (`DOMAIN_NAME`, `USER_NAME`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha`.`jmocha_mail_signature_template` ( `sign_no` INT(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `content` LONGTEXT NULL, `displayname` VARCHAR(45) NULL, `displayname2` VARCHAR(45) NULL, `tenant_id` MEDIUMINT(5) NULL, `company_id` VARCHAR(45) NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`sign_no`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_user_jobmaster` ( `JOBID` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TYPE` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `CN` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USEFLAG` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `SORT` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `CREATEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`JOBID`,`TYPE`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_config (tenant_id, property_name, property_value, description, config_name, regdate, config_type) VALUES (#tenantID#, #confName#, #property_value#, #description#, #config_name#, #regdate#, #config_type#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT $COLUMN$$COLUMN_MYSQL$ FROM $TABLE$ LIMIT 1 )
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ ADD $COLUMN$$COLUMN_MYSQL$ $TYPE_MYSQL$ $AFTER$$AFTER_MYSQL$
ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ DROP PRIMARY KEY
ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ DROP INDEX $CONSTRAINT$
ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ ADD $CONSTRAINT$ PRIMARY KEY $PRIMARY$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE $TABLE$ SET $COLUMN$$COLUMN_MYSQL$ = $UPDATE$$UPDATE_MYSQL$
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_webfolder_token` ( `USERID` varchar(32) NOT NULL, `LTOKEN` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL, `REGDATA` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `COMPID` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANTID` varchar(45) NOT NULL, `DEVICE` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`USERID`,`TENANTID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE TBL_FIDO_SESSION( FIDO_SESSION_ID varchar(50) NOT NULL, USER_ID varchar(80) NOT NULL, CREATE_TIME DATETIME NOT NULL, ACCESS_IP varchar(80) NOT NULL, STATUS varchar(50), PRIMARY KEY (FIDO_SESSION_ID) )

CREATE TABLE `tbl_portal_theme_portlet` ( `theme_id` int(11) NOT NULL, `tenant_id` mediumint(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `company_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `portlet_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `portlet_used` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `portlet_order` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `menu_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `is_fixed` int(11) DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`theme_id`,`tenant_id`,`company_id`,`portlet_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual` ( `USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьВмьЫРID', `MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT 'ьЫФь░и ьИШ', `ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT 'ьЧ░ь░и ьИШ', `ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT 'ь╢Фъ░А ьЧ░ь░и ьИШ', `JOIN_DATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮЕьВмьЭ╝', `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВмID', `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ID', PRIMARY KEY (`USER_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual_canappl` ( `ATTITUDE_ID` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╖╝эГЬID', `APPL_CNT` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьИШьаХьЛаь▓нэВд', `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВмID', `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ID', `WRITER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРID', `WRITER_NAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРьЭ┤ыжД', `WRITER_NAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРьЭ┤ыжД2', `WRITER_TITLE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРьзБьЬД', `WRITER_TITLE2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРьзБьЬД2', `WRITER_DEPT_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРы╢АьДЬID', `WRITER_DEPT_NAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРы╢АьДЬьЭ┤ыжД', `WRITER_DEPT_NAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮСьД▒ьЮРы╢АьДЬьЭ┤ыжД2', `DELFLAG` char(1) DEFAULT '0', `APPR_USER_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьК╣ьЭ╕ьЮРID', `APPR_DATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьК╣ьЭ╕ьЭ╝ьЛЬ', `APPR_STATUS` char(1) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'ьК╣ьЭ╕ьГБэГЬ', `CONTENT` varchar(3000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ыВ┤ьЪй', `APPR_USER_NAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьК╣ьЭ╕ьЮРьЭ┤ыжД', `APPR_USER_NAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьК╣ьЭ╕ьЮРьЭ┤ыжД2', `APPL_DATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьИШьаХьЛаь▓ньЭ╝ьЛЬ', PRIMARY KEY (`ATTITUDE_ID`,`APPL_CNT`,`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual_conf` ( `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `ANNUAL_CANCEL_RULE` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `USE_ANNUAL_AUTO_GNRT` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `ANNUAL_GNRT_STD` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `INITIAL_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, `USE_MINUS_ANNUAL` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `USE_ANNUAL_TMNT` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `ROUND_OFF_RULE` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `CONF_SET_DATE` date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual_history` ( `ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID` int(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'ьЧ░ь░иьИШьаХъ╕░ыбЭID', `USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьВмьЫРID', `ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╕░ьб┤ьЧ░ь░иьИШ', `CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьИШьаХьЧ░ь░иьИШ', `CHANGE_REASON` varchar(2000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьИШьаХьВмьЬа', `CHANGE_DATE` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьИШьаХьЭ╝ьЮР', `CHANGE_USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьИШьаХьЮРID', `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВмID', `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ID', PRIMARY KEY (`ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_apr_conn` ( `ATTITUDE_ID` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `USER_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `ANNUAL_DOC_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `CANCEL_DOC_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, `CANCEL_APPR_STATUS` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`ATTITUDE_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET` ( `CN` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'id', `BRD_ID` DECIMAL(22,0) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьЮРьЫРъ┤Аыжм id', `BRD_COMPANY` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL COMMENT 'company id', `TENANT_ID` MEDIUMINT(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ id', PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`CN`,`BRD_COMPANY`,`BRD_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_portal_theme_auth` ( `theme_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЕМызИ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `company_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'эЪМьВм ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `tenant_id` mediumint(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `user_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'ьВмьЪйьЮР/ы╢АьДЬ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `access_YN` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьаСъ╖╝ ъ░АыКе(1), ьаСъ╖╝ ы╢Иъ░А(0)', `user_type` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьВмьЪйьЮР(U), ы╢АьДЬ(D)', PRIMARY KEY (`theme_id`,`company_id`,`tenant_id`,`user_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
sqlMap.select: SELECT PORTLET_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE PORTLET_ID = 1 LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_portal_portlet_auth` ( `portlet_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эПмэЛАыж┐ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `company_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'эЪМьВм ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `tenant_id` mediumint(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `user_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'ьВмьЪйьЮР/ы╢АьДЬ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', `access_YN` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьаСъ╖╝ ъ░АыКе(1), ьаСъ╖╝ ы╢Иъ░А(0)', `user_type` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ьВмьЪйьЮР(U), ы╢АьДЬ(D)', PRIMARY KEY (`portlet_id`,`company_id`,`tenant_id`,`user_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_MENU ADD menucode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET ADD portletcode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menucode = CASE WHEN menu_url like '%ezNewPortal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'portal' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'mail' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSchedule%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN menu_url like '%ezApprovalG%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'approval' WHEN menu_url like '%ezBoard%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'board' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCommunity%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN menu_url like '%ezResource%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCircular%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'circular' WHEN menu_url like '%ezJournal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'journal' WHEN menu_url like '%ezAttitude%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'attitude' WHEN menu_url like '%ezWebFolder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCabinet%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'cabinet' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPMS%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'pms' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do?funCode=2%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'address' WHEN menu_url like '%ezQuestion%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'question' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPoll%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN menu_url like '%ezLadder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'ladder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezTask%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'task' WHEN menu_url like '%ezMemo%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'memo' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSurvey%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET SET portletcode = CASE WHEN portlet_url like '%receivedMailPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'receivedmail' WHEN portlet_url like '%noticePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'notice' WHEN portlet_url like '%votePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN portlet_url like '%pollPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'poll' WHEN portlet_url like '%schedulePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN portlet_url like '%approvalListPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'approvallist' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteFormsPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteforms' WHEN portlet_url like '%photoBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'photoboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%communityPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN portlet_url like '%helpPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'help' WHEN portlet_url like '%weatherPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'weather' WHEN portlet_url like '%birthdayPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'birthday' WHEN portlet_url like '%slideImagePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'slideimage' WHEN portlet_url like '%userInfoPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'userinfo' WHEN portlet_url like '%movieBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'movieboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%countPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'count' WHEN portlet_url like '%resourcePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN portlet_url like '%surveyPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' WHEN portlet_url like '%webFolderPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' WHEN portlet_url like '%tabBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'tabBoard' END
sqlMap.select: SELECT START_IP startIP, END_IP endIP, START_IP_NUMBER startIPNumber, END_IP_NUMBER endIPNumber, COUNTRY_CODE countryCode, COUNTRY_NAME countryName FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COUNTRYIP WHERE START_IP_NUMBER <= #changeIp# AND END_IP_NUMBER >= #changeIp#
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY` ( `TENANT_ID` int(11) NOT NULL, `COUNTRY_CODE` varchar(800) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR ( OWNER_ID varchar(45) NOT NULL, SHARE_ID varchar(45) NOT NULL, SHARE_TYPE varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL, OWNER_TYPE varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (OWNER_ID,SHARE_ID,TENANT_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `tbl_ps_popup_user` ( `itemseq` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `user_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `user_type` varchar(10) NOT NULL, `tenant_id` int(11) NOT NULL, `companyid` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `subdept_permitted` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `sn` int(11) DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`itemseq`,`user_id`,`user_type`,`tenant_id`,`companyid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='эМЭьЧЕ ъ│╡ьзА ыМАьГБьЮР ъ┤Аыаи эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(member_id) FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (member_type = 'USER' AND member_id = #userId#) OR (member_type = 'DEPT' AND (member_id = #deptId# or member_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (member_type = 'JIKWI' AND member_id IN ( SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION DISTINCT SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#))
)

SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE dept_cd_path REGEXP( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(dept_cd_path SEPARATOR '|') FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn IN ( SELECT member_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' ) ) AND ( cn = #deptId# OR cn IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )

SELECT a.cn, a.password, a.displayname, a.displayname2, a.department, a.description, a.description2, a.title, a.title2, a.physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, a.company, a.company2, a.updatedt, a.extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, a.telephonenumber, a.mail, a.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, a.tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, a.loginCnt, a.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, a.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, a.extensionattribute14 as sabun, a.password_updatedt FROM tbl_usermaster a JOIN tbl_permissiongroupinfo b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND a.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#) AND
( (b.member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND a.extensionattribute8 = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'JIKWI' AND a.extensionattribute7 = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'ORGAN' AND a.physicaldeliveryofficename = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'USER' AND a.cn = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'DEPT' AND a.department = b.member_id)
OR (a.department IN ( SELECT CN FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE dept_cd_path REGEXP( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(dept_cd_path SEPARATOR '|') FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn IN ( SELECT member_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' ) ) ) )
) WHERE b.group_id = #groupId# AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') AS CNT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.statement: ALTER VIEW vaprdoingdoclist AS SELECT tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_aprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCSTATE END AS DOCSTATE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '000' AND tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_aprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_aprdocinfo JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_aprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_aprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_aprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expaprdocinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' OR tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '005') AND NOT (TBL_APRDOCINFO.functiontype = '004' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprtype = '007') AND tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL

ALTER VIEW vendchamjodocinfo AS SELECT tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, '017' AS DOCSTATE, '002' AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_endaprdocinfo JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007' AND tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '031'
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE jmocha_address_info ADD COLUMN s_furigana VARCHAR(120) NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER s_type
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_opengovdocinfo` ( `docid` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `openflag` char(9) DEFAULT NULL, `basis` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8 DEFAULT NULL, `reason` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8 DEFAULT NULL, `openlimitdate` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `createdate` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `updatedate` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `companyid` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `listopenflag` char(2) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`docid`,`tenant_id`,`companyid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_opengovfileinfo` ( `DOCID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `SN` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `FILEOPENFLAG` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOCID`,`SN`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='ьЫРым╕ьаХы│┤ъ│╡ъ░Ь ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф';
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DEPTID) FROM (SELECT DEPTID, JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER TD ON (A.DEPTID = TD.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = TD.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 AS JOBID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) D WHERE D.DEPTID = #deptID#
AND D.JOBID = #jobID#
AND D.JOBID IS NULL
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `jmocha_user_distribution` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `OWNER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `DISCLOSURE_POLICY` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `EXPLAINATION` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `DL_END_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_user_distribution_mem` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `MEMBER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `REG_DATE` date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`MEMBER_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_user_dist_apply` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `APPLICANT_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `APPLICANT_DATE` date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`APPLICANT_ID`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'autoSendOfferFlag' AND TENANT_ID = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID,PROPERTY_NAME,PROPERTY_VALUE,DESCRIPTION,CONFIG_NAME,REGDATE,CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (0, 'autoSendOfferFlag', '0', 'ьЮРыПЩы░ЬьЖбьЭШыв░ ьВмьЪй ьЛЬ ъ╕░ьХИы╢АьДЬ ь╡ЬьвЕъ▓░ьЮмъ░А ыБЭыВШый┤ ъ╕░ьХИьЮРьЭШ ып╕ь▓Шыжмым╕ьДЬэХиьЧР ыПДь░йэХЬыЛд. 0: ьЮРыПЩы░ЬьЖбьЭШыв░ ьВмьЪйьХИэХи, 1: ьЮРыПЩы░ЬьЖбьЭШыв░ ьВмьЪйэХи (ыВ┤ы╢АьЛЬэЦЙым╕, ып╝ьЫРьЭ╕ьЛЬэЦЙым╕ызМ ьЮРыПЩы░ЬьЖбьЭШыв░) (default: 0)', 'ыВ┤ы╢АьЛЬэЦЙым╕ ьЮРыПЩы░ЬьЖбьЭШыв░ ьШ╡ьЕШ', '2020-11-23 00:00:00.000', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮмG')

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_yearlydoccount`( `DOC_COUNT` mediumint(11), `DOC_TYPE` VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'INSEND: ыВ┤ы╢Аы░ЬьЖб, OUTSEND: ьЩ╕ы╢Аы░ЬьЖб, OUTRECIEVE: ьЩ╕ы╢АьИШьЛа', `MONTH_TYPE` VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '1 ~ 12ьЫФ, ьЮСыЕД-10(2) ~ 0(12) ьЫФ', `CREATE_ID` VARCHAR(80) , `CREATE_DATE` datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp(), `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5), `COMPANYID` VARCHAR(80) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
ALTER TABLE TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN ADD MOBILE_FLAG TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN DROP PRIMARY KEY
ALTER TABLE TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN ADD CONSTRAINT TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN_PK PRIMARY KEY (USER_ID, MOBILE_FLAG, TENANT_ID)

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_mailbox_progress` ( `USER_KEY` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `ACT` varchar(15) NOT NULL, `PERCENT` mediumint(100) NOT NULL, `UPDATEDT` datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp(), PRIMARY KEY (`USER_KEY`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER ( `SEQ_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `FILE_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `USER_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `USER_TYPE` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `CREATE_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `CREATE_DATE` DATE NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` INT(7) NOT NULL, `SUBDEPT_PERMITTED` INT(11) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`SEQ_ID`, `TENANT_ID`) )
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FOLDERUSER MINVALUE 1000 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FILEUSER MINVALUE 1000 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (member_type = 'USER' AND member_id = #userId#) OR (member_type = 'DEPT' AND (member_id = #deptId# OR member_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (member_type = 'JIKWI' AND member_id IN ( SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)) OR ( member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' AND ( (SELECT group_concat(dept_cd_path separator ',') as a FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn = #deptId# OR CN IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)) REGEXP CONCAT(',', member_id, ',' ) ) ) )
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE ( FILE_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, VERSION INT(7) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID INT(7) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE_PK PRIMARY KEY (`FILE_ID`, `VERSION`, `TENANT_ID`) )

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY ( `FILE_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `VERSION` INT(7) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, `FILE_PATH` VARCHAR(250) NOT NULL, `FILE_SIZE` BIGINT(20) NOT NULL, `USE_STATUS` VARCHAR(250) DEFAULT 'Y' NOT NULL, `UPDATE_DATE` DATETIME NOT NULL, `UPDATE_ID` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL, `UPDATE_NAME` VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL, `UPDATE_NAME2` VARCHAR(120), `DELETER_ID` VARCHAR(100), `TENANT_ID` INT(7) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY_PK PRIMARY KEY (`FILE_ID`, `VERSION`, `TENANT_ID`) )

ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG ADD ( FILE_ID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, VERSION INT(7) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_ID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_PATH VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_PATH_NAME VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, TOP_FOLDER_ID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, TOP_FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL )
CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT ( FOLDER_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID INT(7) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT_PK PRIMARY KEY (`FOLDER_ID`, `TENANT_ID`) )

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HISTORY ( APPLY_ID VARCHAR(40), TENANT_ID INT(5), COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL, FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, CONTENT VARCHAR(1000), APPLICATION_DATE DATETIME NOT NULL, APPROVAL_STATUS VARCHAR(10), APPROVAL_STATUS_UPDATEDT DATETIME, CONSTRAINT `PK2_TBL_WF_APPLY_HISTORY` PRIMARY KEY (`APPLY_ID`) )

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HIST_MEM ( APPLY_ID VARCHAR(40), MEMBER_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL, MEMBER_NAME VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, MEMBER_TYPE VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, MEMBER_ITEM VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT `PK2_TBL_WF_APPLY_HIST_MEM` PRIMARY KEY (`APPLY_ID`,`MEMBER_ID`,`MEMBER_TYPE`,`MEMBER_ITEM`) )
CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENC_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID INT(7) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTION_FOLDER_PK PRIMARY KEY (`FOLDER_ID`, `TENANT_ID`) )

CREATE TABLE `tbl_serialnumgen_grant` ( `IDX` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `DEPTID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `DEPTNAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `GRANTDEPTID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `GRANTDEPTNAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`IDX`,`DEPTID`,`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantID#, 'useApprImageConvert', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮм ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьЭ┤ып╕ьзА ы│АэЩШьЖФыгиьЕШ ьВмьЪй', '0', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮм ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьЭ┤ып╕ьзА ы│АэЩШьЖФыгиьЕШ ьВмьЪй ьЧмы╢А 0: ьВмьЪй 1: ьВмьЪйьХИэХи (default : 0)', '2021-06-15 00:00:00', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮм')

INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantID#, 'apprConvertExt', 'ьЭ┤ып╕ьзА ы│АэЩШьЖФыгиьЕШ ьВмьЪйэХа ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮм ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ эЩХьЮеьЮР ыкиьЭМ', 'xlsx:xls:pdf:hwp:doc', 'ьЭ┤ып╕ьзА ы│АэЩШэХа эЩХьЮеьЮР ыкиьЭМ (default : xlsx, xls, pdf, hwp, doc) / ъ╡мы╢ДьЮР : ', '2021-06-15 00:00:00', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮм')
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE CODE1 ='A54' AND CODE2 = '002'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODELIST SELECT CODE1, '002', NAME, ISUSE, 'Y:ыЛдьдСы░░ы╢А ым╕ьДЬ ьЮмы░░ы╢АьЪФь▓н ьЛЬ эХЬъ░ЬьЭШ ым╕ьДЬызМ ыВиъ╣А, N:ыЛдьдСы░░ы╢Аым╕ьДЬ ьЮмы░░ы╢АьЪФь▓ньЛЬ ым╕ьДЬы│АэЩФ ьЧЖьЭМ', NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE CODE1 = 'A54' AND CODE2 = '001'
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_car` ( `CAR_ID` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `CAR_NAME` varchar(510) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_NAME2` varchar(510) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_NM` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `CAR_GB` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_LEVEL` bigint(10) DEFAULT 0, `CAR_STEP` bigint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_ACCESS` varchar(2000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_UPPER` bigint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `OWNDEPTID` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNDEPTNM` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNDEPTNM2` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERID` varchar(2000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERNM` varchar(32) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERNM2` varchar(32) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERPOSITION` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERPOSITION2` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERCALL` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_REGISTER_DATE` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DELFLAG` varchar(2) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `CAR_URL` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_EXPLAIN` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`CAR_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car_acl` ( `CAR_ID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `MEMBER_NAM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `MEMBER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `ACCESS_LVL` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `DEPT_YN` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `SDA_YN` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`CAR_ID`,`MEMBER_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car_attach` ( `ATTACHID` bigint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `CAR_ID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `FILESIZE` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `FILENAME` varchar(500) NOT NULL, `FILEPATH` varchar(500) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`ATTACHID`,`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=93 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car_form` ( `CAR_FORM_ID` bigint(40) NOT NULL, `CAR_ID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `REGISTER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `REGISTER_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, `REV_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, `REV_TIME` varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, `REV_TIME2` varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, `DRIVER_DEPTNAME` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `DRIVER_NAME` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `B_DEPT_ID` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `B_DEPART_TIME` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `B_DISTANCE` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `DRIVE_PURPOSE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DRIVE_POINT` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `A_ARRIVE_TIME` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_AUTO` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_COMMUTE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_WORK` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_ETC` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_SUBMIT_FLAG` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `CAR_REGISTER_NO` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `DELFLAG` varchar(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`CAR_FORM_ID`,`CAR_ID`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`,`CAR_REGISTER_NO`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

ALTER VIEW `vtaskclass` AS SELECT `tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AS `CATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME` AS `CNAME`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME2` AS `CNAME2`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AS `MCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME` AS `MCNAME`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME2` AS `MCNAME2`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AS `SUBCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME` AS `SCNAME`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME2` AS `SCNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` AS `TASKCODE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME` AS `TASKNAME`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME2` AS `TASKNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPERIOD` AS `KEEPINGPERIOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECFLAG` AS `DISPLAYRECFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SPECIALCATALOGFLAG` AS `SPECIALCATALOGFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SC1` AS `SC1`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SC2` AS `SC2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SC3` AS `SC3`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TEMPFLAG` AS `TEMPFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` AS `COMPANYID`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AS `TENANT_ID`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTCODE` AS `PROCESSDEPTCODE`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME2` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGMETHOD` AS `KEEPINGMETHOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPLACE` AS `KEEPINGPLACE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECTRASTIME` AS `DISPLAYRECTRASTIME`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` AS `DELFLAG`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_TOP`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_MID`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_SUB` FROM ((((`tbl_taskcategory` JOIN `tbl_taskmiddlecategory` ON (`tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_tasksubcategory` ON (`tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_taskcode` ON (`tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskcode`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`DELFLAG` = '0')) LEFT JOIN `tbl_task_deptinfo` ON (`tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TASKCODE` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`COMPANYID`)) WHERE `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '0' OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` IS NULL OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '2'

ALTER VIEW `svtaskclass` AS SELECT `tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AS `CATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME` AS `CNAME`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME2` AS `CNAME2`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AS `MCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME` AS `MCNAME`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME2` AS `MCNAME2`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AS `SUBCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME` AS `SCNAME`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME2` AS `SCNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` AS `TASKCODE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME` AS `TASKNAME`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME2` AS `TASKNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPERIOD` AS `KEEPINGPERIOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECFLAG` AS `DISPLAYRECFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SPECIALCATALOGFLAG` AS `SPECIALCATALOGFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TEMPFLAG` AS `TEMPFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` AS `COMPANYID`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AS `TENANT_ID`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTCODE` AS `PROCESSDEPTCODE`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME2` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGMETHOD` AS `KEEPINGMETHOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPLACE` AS `KEEPINGPLACE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECTRASTIME` AS `DISPLAYRECTRASTIME`, `tbl_taskcode`.`ISPUBLIC` AS `ISPUBLIC`, `tbl_taskcode`.`ITEMSECURITY` AS `ITEMSECURITY`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` AS `DELFLAG`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_TOP`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_MID`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_SUB` FROM ((((`tbl_taskcategory` JOIN `tbl_taskmiddlecategory` ON (`tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_tasksubcategory` ON (`tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_taskcode` ON (`tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskcode`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID`)) LEFT JOIN `tbl_task_deptinfo` ON (`tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TASKCODE` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`COMPANYID`)) WHERE `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '0' OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` IS NULL OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '2'

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE ( SCHEDULEID BIGINT(10) NOT NULL, REPEATCOUNT BIGINT(10) NOT NULL, ISALLREP VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N', STARTDATE DATETIME NOT NULL, TENANT_ID MEDIUMINT(5), COMPANYID VARCHAR(40), PRIMARY KEY (`SCHEDULEID`, `REPEATCOUNT`, `ISALLREP`, `STARTDATE`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
ALTER TABLE TBL_CONNECTION_INFO ADD IF NOT EXISTS ( DISCONNECTTIME DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, STATUS VARCHAR(1) DEFAULT NULL, SESSIONCODE VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO ( SEQUENCE INT(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, USERID VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, USERNM VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, USERNM2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, DEPTID VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, DEPTNM VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, DEPTNM2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, TITLE VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, TITLE2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, COMPANYID VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, COMPANYNM VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, COMPANYNM2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSIP VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSINFO VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSTIME DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSBROWSER VARCHAR(40) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSOS VARCHAR(80) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSAGENT VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, ADMINTYPE VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, TENANT_ID DECIMAL(22,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`SEQUENCE`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_mail_outofoffice_tem` ( `USER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME` varchar(45) NOT NULL, `CONTENT` LONGTEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`USER_ID`,`DISPLAYNAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `JMOCHA_USER_MAIL_TEMPLATE` ( `USER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME` varchar(45) NOT NULL, `TEMPLATE_ID` varchar(510) NOT NULL, `REGDATE` datetime NOT NULL, `EDITORTYPE` varchar(5), `CONTENT` LONGTEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`USER_ID`,`DISPLAYNAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `tbl_admin_access_ip` ( `IPNO` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `IPADDRESS` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `ALLOW_ACCESS` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'NO', `EXPLANATION` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`IPNO`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO ( `SEQUENCE` INT(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `USERID` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, `USERNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `USERNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTID` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TITLE` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TITLE2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZEDTIME` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, `ADMINTYPE` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `STATUS` VARCHAR(40) DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERID` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERIP` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` DECIMAL(22,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`SEQUENCE`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_DEV_MASTER ADD IF NOT EXISTS ( PIN VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, PINSTATE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N', BIOMETRIC CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' )

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM ADD FORM_HTML2 VARCHAR(3000) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM SET FORM_HTML2 = CASE WHEN FORM_ID = 0 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 1 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 2 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 3 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 4 THEN 'NameDate Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 5 THEN 'NameDate Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 6 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 7 THEN 'NameDate ~ Workplace Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 8 THEN 'NameDate All day ~ Workplace Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 9 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 10 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information ' ELSE NULL END WHERE FORM_HTML2 IS NULL
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_user_change_info` ( `SEQ` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `USERID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `USERNM` varchar(120) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `USERNM2` varchar(120) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `UPDATEDT` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `TARGET_DEPTID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `TARGET_DEPTNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TARGET_DEPTNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `UPDATE_TYPE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORNM` varchar(120) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORNM2` varchar(120) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORIP` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANTID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`SEQ`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_dept_change_info` ( `SEQ` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `DEPTID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `DEPTNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `PARENT_DEPTID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `PARENT_DEPTNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `PARENT_DEPTNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `UPDATEDT` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `TARGET_DEPTID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `TARGET_DEPTNM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TARGET_DEPTNM2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `UPDATE_TYPE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORNM` varchar(120) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORNM2` varchar(120) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `EXECUTORIP` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANTID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`SEQ`) )

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY ADD FILE_NAME VARCHAR(250)

CREATE TABLE `tbl_total_history` ( `DOCID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `USERID` varchar(400) NOT NULL, `REGDATE` datetime NOT NULL, `GUBUN` varchar(12) DEFAULT NULL, `USERJOBTITLE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `USERDEPTID` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `USERDEPTNAME` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USERNAME` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USERNAME2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USERJOBTITLE2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USERDEPTNAME2` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOCID`, `USERID`, `REGDATE`, `TENANT_ID`, `COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='2023-06-30 ъ╕░ьдА эЖ╡эХй PC ьаАьЮеьЧРьДЬызМ ьВмьЪйэХШъ│а ьЮИьЭМ. gubun ьЭА "D"(Download) ыбЬ ьВмьЪйэХШъ│а ьЮИьЭМ.';

YES: ьВмьЪй NO: ьВмьЪйьХИэХи (default: NO)', 'эЧдыНФ ьИиъ╕░ъ╕░ ъ╕░ыКе ьВмьЪйьЧмы╢А', '2024-05-23 00:00:00', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮм')
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_RS_BRD ADD REPEATFLAG varchar(2) DEFAULT '1'
ALTER TABLE tbl_portal_menu_auth ADD subdept_permitted VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT 'N'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_portal_menu_auth SET subdept_permitted = 'Y' WHERE user_type = 0
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE tbl_portal_portlet_auth ADD subdept_permitted VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT 'N'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_portal_portlet_auth SET subdept_permitted = 'Y' WHERE user_type = 0
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE tbl_portal_theme_auth ADD subdept_permitted VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT 'N'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_portal_theme_auth SET subdept_permitted = 'Y' WHERE user_type = 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT USER_TYPE, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED FROM tbl_ps_quicklink_acl LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE tbl_ps_quicklink_acl ADD COLUMN USER_TYPE VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ADD COLUMN SUBDEPT_PERMITTED VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT 'N'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_ps_quicklink_acl qla LEFT JOIN tbl_usermaster um ON qla.accessid = um.cn and qla.TENANT_ID = um.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN tbl_deptmaster dm ON qla.accessid = dm.cn and qla.TENANT_ID = dm.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN tbl_user_jobmaster ujm ON qla.accessid = CAST(ujm.jobid AS CHAR) and qla.TENANT_ID = ujm.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN tbl_permissiongrouplist pgl ON qla.accessid = pgl.group_id and qla.TENANT_ID = pgl.TENANT_ID SET qla.user_type = CASE WHEN um.cn IS NOT NULL THEN 'USER' WHEN dm.cn IS NOT NULL THEN 'DEPT' WHEN (ujm.jobid IS NOT null and ujm.`TYPE` = '001') THEN 'jIKWI' WHEN (ujm.jobid IS NOT null and ujm.`TYPE` = '002') THEN 'JIKCHEK' WHEN pgl.group_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'GROUP' ELSE 'USER' END, qla.subdept_permitted = CASE WHEN dm.cn IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'ApprNonElecRecType' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

(MHT ыШРыКФ HWP) (default : HWP)', '2021-04-07 00:00:00', 'ьаДьЮРъ▓░ьЮмG')
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_APPR_USER ( TENANT_ID int(11) NOT NULL, COMPANY_ID varchar(80) NOT NULL, USER_ID varchar(100) NOT NULL, USER_TYPE varchar(10) NOT null, PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USER_ID,USER_TYPE) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_APPR_HISTORY ( TENANT_ID int(11) NOT NULL, COMPANY_ID varchar(80) NOT NULL, MAIL_UID bigint(20) NOT NULL, SUBJECT longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, SENDEREMAIL varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_ID varchar(100) NOT NULL, USER_NAME varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_NAME2 varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_DEPTID varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_DEPTNAME varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_DEPTNAME2 varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, WRITE_DATE datetime DEFAULT NULL, APPROVER_ID varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, APPROVER_NAME varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, APPROVER_NAME2 varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, UPDATEDT datetime DEFAULT NULL, STATE varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, MEMO varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, DEL_FLAG varchar(10) DEFAULT 'N', PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID,MAIL_UID,USER_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_APPR_COMP_HISTORY ( TENANT_ID int(11) NOT NULL, COMPANY_ID varchar(80) NOT NULL, MAIL_UID bigint(20) NOT NULL, SUBJECT longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, SENDEREMAIL varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_ID varchar(100) NOT NULL, USER_NAME varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_NAME2 varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_DEPTID varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_DEPTNAME varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, USER_DEPTNAME2 varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, WRITE_DATE datetime DEFAULT NULL, APPROVER_ID varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, APPROVER_NAME varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, APPROVER_NAME2 varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, UPDATEDT datetime DEFAULT NULL, STATE varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, MEMO varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, DEL_FLAG varchar(10) DEFAULT 'N', PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID,MAIL_UID,USER_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE jmocha_address_last_sent ( SEQUENCE bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, CN varchar(80) NOT NULL, name varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, email varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, sent_date datetime DEFAULT utc_timestamp, PRIMARY KEY (SEQUENCE) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.select: SELECT #v_COLUMN# FROM jmocha_appr_allowed_domain jmocha_appr_user jmocha_appr_history jmocha_appr_comp_history jmocha_address_last_sent LIMIT 1

create table tbl_portal_portlet_company_size ( TENANT_ID mediumint(5) default 0 not null comment 'эЕМыДМэК╕ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', COMPANY_ID varchar(100) default '' not null comment 'эЪМьВм ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', PORTLET_ID int default 0 not null comment 'эПмэЛАыж┐ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', THEME_ID int default 1 not null, SIZE_ID int not null comment 'ьВмьЪйъ░АыКеэХЬ эПмэЛАыж┐ ьВмьЭ┤ьжИ ID', DEFAULT_FLAG tinyint(1) default 0 not null comment 'ъ╕░ы│╕ ьВмьЭ┤ьжИ ьДдьаХ ьЧмы╢А', primary key (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, THEME_ID, SIZE_ID), constraint FK_tbl_portal_portlet_company_size_SIZE_ID foreign key (SIZE_ID) references jmocha.tbl_portal_portlet_size (SIZE_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 comment 'эПмэЛАыж┐ ьВмьЭ┤ьжИ эБ┤ыЮШьКдыкЕ ьаХьЭШ эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф'

create table tbl_portal_portlet_user_size ( USER_ID varchar(100) not null comment 'ьВмьЪйьЮР ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', TENANT_ID mediumint default 0 not null comment 'эЕМыДМэК╕ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', COMPANY_ID varchar(100) default '' not null comment 'эЪМьВм ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', PORTLET_ID int default 0 not null comment 'эПмэЛАыж┐ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', THEME_ID int default 1 not null, SIZE_ID int not null, primary key (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, THEME_ID), constraint FK_tbl_portal_portlet_user_size_tbl_portal_portlet_size_SIZE_ID foreign key (SIZE_ID) references jmocha.tbl_portal_portlet_size (SIZE_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 comment 'ьВмьЪйьЮР ы│Д эПмэЛАыж┐ ьВмьЭ┤ьжИ ьДдьаХ эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф'

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `TBL_DISTRIBUTEINFO` ( `SN` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `DOCID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `RECEIPTDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `ORGANID` varchar(400) NOT NULL, `ORGAN` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `ORGANUSERNAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `DOCNUMBER` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `MANAGEDEPTID` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `MANAGEDEPT` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `ORGDOCNUMCODE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DOCTITLE` varchar(1020) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `MANAGEDEPT2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `ORGAN2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `ORGANUSERNAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `PARENTDOCID` varchar(80) NULL, `ORGDOCID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `DELIVERYSN` bigint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `TYPE` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`,`SN`,`DOCID`,`ORGANID`(255)) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COMMENT='ы░░ы╢АьЭ┤ыае ьаХы│┤'

CREATE TABLE `TBL_EXECUTIVE` ( `CN` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `PRIORITY` INT(11) NOT NULL, `USAGE` CHAR(1) NOT NULL, `CREATEUSER` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `LASTUPDATE` DATETIME NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` MEDIUMINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`CN`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE TBL_SURVEY_RESULTVIEWPERMISSION ( SURVEY_ID INT(11) NOT NULL, COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID INT(9) NOT NULL, CN VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╢МэХЬьЮР ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', USER_TYPE VARCHAR(30) COMMENT 'ъ╢МэХЬьЮР эГАьЮЕ', SUBDEPT_PERMITTED VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT 'Y(эХШьЬД ъ░АыКе), N(эХШьЬД ы╢Иъ░А)', CNNAME VARCHAR(120) COMMENT 'ъ╢МэХЬьЮР ьЭ┤ыжД', CNNAME2 VARCHAR(120) COMMENT 'ъ╢МэХЬьЮР ьЭ┤ыжД', PRIMARY KEY (SURVEY_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, CN) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT 'ьДдым╕ ьзАьаХъ│╡ъ░ЬыМАьГБьЮР ыжмьКдэК╕ эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф'

CREATE TABLE `TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG` ( `CODE` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `CODEVALUE` varchar(2000) NOT NULL, `DESCRIPTION` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITERID` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITERNAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TYPECODE` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `ISDELETEBLOCK` CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N', PRIMARY KEY (`CODE`,`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE` ( `TYPECODE` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TYPENAME` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `TYPENAME2` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `DESCRIPTION` varchar(3000) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITERID` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITERNAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITERNAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TYPECODE`,`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_noti_emergency_company` ( `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `EMERGENCY_CONTENT` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITERID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `WRITEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_noti_emergency_item` ( `NOTIID` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `WRITERID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `NOTITITLE` varchar(2000) DEFAULT NULL, `NOTIBODY` varchar(2000) DEFAULT NULL, `WRITEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`NOTIID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_noti_emergency_permission` ( `PERMISSION_CODE` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `CN` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `DEPTID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `JOBID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `ROLEID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `USER_TYPE` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `REGDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `SUBDEPTYN` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`PERMISSION_CODE`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=28 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE MENU_TYPE = 'MG'
AND MENU_ID > 0
SELECT NVL(MAX(menu_id), 0) + 1 as menuId FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU (menu_id, menu_url, menu_type, icon_url, default_order, menucode) SELECT #menuId#, '/mobile/ezEmail/mailList.do?folderId=INBOX', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_mail', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mMail' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 1), '/mobile/ezOrgan/personList.do', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_employee', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 2 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mAddress' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 2), '/mobile/ezApprovalG/mApproveList.do?pType=DO', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_approval', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 3 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mApproval' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 3), '/mobile/ezResource/searchTodayList.do', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_resource', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 4 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mResource' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 4), '/mobile/ezBoard/boardItemList.do?boardID={FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_notice', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 5 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mBoard' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 5), '/mobile/ezAddress/addressList.do?pSearchTarget=personal', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_address', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 6 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mAddress' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 6), '/mobile/ezSchedule/mScheduleList.do', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_schedule', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 7 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mSchedule' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 7), '/mobile/ezSurvey/surveyList.do?mode=processing', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_survey', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 8 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mSurvey' UNION ALL SELECT (#menuId# + 8), '/mobile/ezWebfolder/main.do', 'MG', 'iconCommon icon_webfolder', (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 9 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A), 'mWebfolder'

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, MENU_ID, MENU_USED, COMPANY_LANG, COMPANY_ORDER) SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, #menuId#, 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 1), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 2 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 2), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 3 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 3), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 4 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 4), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 5 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 5), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 6 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 6), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 7 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 7), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 8 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) UNION ALL SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, (#menuId# + 8), 1, 1, (SELECT MAX(A.COMPANY_ORDER) + 9 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_TOP_USER ADD USECOLOR TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьВмьЪй ыкиыУЬ(ьГЙьГБ)'
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME WHERE THEME_NAME LIKE 'эЕМызИ%'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_NAME = 'ъ╕░ы│╕эШХ', THEME_NAME2 = 'Default Type', THEME_NAME3 = 'уБНуБ╗уВУуБМуБЯ' WHERE THEME_ID = 1
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_NAME = 'ы░ФыбЬъ░Аъ╕░эШХ', THEME_NAME2 = 'Shortcut Type', THEME_NAME3 = 'уВ╖уГзуГ╝уГИуВлуГГуГИуБМуБЯ' WHERE THEME_ID = 2
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_NAME = 'ьаХы│┤ы╢ДыжмэШХ', THEME_NAME2 = 'Information Separation Type', THEME_NAME3 = 'уБШуВЗуБЖуБ╗уБЖуБ╢уВУуВКуБМуБЯ' WHERE THEME_ID = 3
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ADD DEPTID varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY ADD ( REPLYLEVEL BIGINT(10) NULL, PARENTREPLYID VARCHAR(100) NULL, PARENTWRITERNAME VARCHAR(100) NULL, UPDATEDATE VARCHAR(40) NULL )
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY ADD IMAGECONTENT varchar(600) NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO ADD DISLIKEFLAG VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE `tbl_board_dislike` ( `ITEMID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `USERID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `DISLIKEDATE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`ITEMID`,`USERID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD ( KEYWORDID bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, KEYWORDNAME varchar(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE, TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (KEYWORDID, TENANT_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD ( KEYWORDID bigint(20) NOT NULL, BOARDID varchar(40) NOT NULL, ITEMID varchar(40) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL, SN tinyint(3) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (KEYWORDID, ITEMID, SN, TENANT_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `TBL_RS_FAV_CAT` ( `CAT_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TOP_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `USER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `CAT_NAME` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `UPDATEDATE` datetime NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `BRDYN` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`CAT_ID`, `TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;

CREATE TABLE `TBL_RS_CAT_BRD` ( `CAT_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `BRD_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `UPDATEDATE` datetime NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`CAT_ID`,`BRD_ID`,`USER_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_boarditem_scrap` ( `USERID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `BOARDID` varchar(76) NOT NULL, `ITEMID` varchar(76) NOT NULL, `SCRAPDATE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`,`USERID`,`BOARDID`,`ITEMID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_userscrapcont` ( `USERSCRAPCONTID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `USERSCRAPCONTNAME` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `PARENTSCRAPCONTID` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `DESCRIPTION` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `USERID` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`,`USERSCRAPCONTID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_userscrapcontlist` ( `BOARDID` varchar(76) NOT NULL, `ITEMID` varchar(76) NOT NULL, `USERID` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `USERSCRAPCONTID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `SCRAPDATE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `DESCRIPTION` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`BOARDID`,`USERSCRAPCONTID`,`ITEMID`,`USERID`, `COMPANYID`), CONSTRAINT `PK_USERSCRAPCONT` FOREIGN KEY (`TENANT_ID`, `COMPANYID`, `USERSCRAPCONTID`) REFERENCES `tbl_userscrapcont` (`TENANT_ID`, `COMPANYID`, `USERSCRAPCONTID`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_COMPANY_QUOTA ( DOMAIN_NAME varchar(100) NOT NULL, COMPANY_ID varchar(160) NOT NULL, MAX_STORAGE double DEFAULT 0, WARN_STORAGE double DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (DOMAIN_NAME, COMPANY_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE TBL_BOARD_COMMENT_ATTACHMENTS ( ITEMID varchar(76) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ъ▓МьЛЬъ╕А ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', REPLYID varchar(76) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ыМУъ╕А ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', SN mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьИЬы▓И', FILEPATH varchar(800) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьаАьЮеъ▓╜ыбЬ', FILESIZE varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ эБмъ╕░', FILENAME varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьЭ┤ыжД', TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЕМыДМэК╕ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ', PRIMARY KEY (ITEMID, REPLYID, SN, TENANT_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT 'ъ▓МьЛЬэМР ыМУъ╕А ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьаХы│┤ эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф';

CREATE TABLE `tbl_gongramdeletehistory` ( `DOCID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `APRMEMBERSN` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `APRTYPE` varchar(12) DEFAULT NULL, `APRSTATE` varchar(12) DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERID` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERISDEPTYN` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERNAME` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERJOBTITLE` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERDEPTID` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERDEPTNAME` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERLDAPPATH` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `RECEIVEDDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `PROCESSDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `DELETEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `REASONDONOTAPPROV` varchar(1020) DEFAULT NULL, `ISPROPOSERYN` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL, `ISBRIEFUSERYN` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERNAME2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`,`DOCID`,`APRMEMBERID`), KEY `tbl_gongramdeletehistory_IDX` (`DOCID`, `APRMEMBERSN`, `TENANT_ID`, `COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `tbl_schedulegathermember` ( `GROUPID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `MEMBERID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `MEMBERNAME` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, `MEMBERNAME2` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`GROUPID`,`MEMBERID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE tbl_board_item_rating_summary ( ITEMID varchar(76) NOT NULL, TOTALRATERS varchar(10) NOT NULL, TOTALSCORE varchar(6) NOT NULL, AVERAGESCORE varchar(5) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL, COMPANYID varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ITEMID, TENANT_ID) )

sqlMap.statement:
CREATE TABLE TBL_STAT_MENU_USER ( USER_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьЬаьаА id(ы╣ДэЪМьЫРьЭА ip)', TENANT_ID MEDIUMINT(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'ы╣аые╕ ы▓ФьЬД ъ▓АьГЙ/ьаХыамьЪй (эШХьЛЭ: YYYYMMDDHH)', COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВм id', IPADDRESS VARCHAR(15) COMMENT 'ip', YEAR SMALLINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыЕДыПД(YYYY)', MONTH TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЫФ(01 ~ 12)', DAY TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЭ╝(01 ~ 31)', HOUR TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЛЬъ░Д(00 ~ 23)', TIME_CODE INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ы╣аые╕ ы▓ФьЬД ъ▓АьГЙ/ьаХыамьЪй (эШХьЛЭ: YYYYMMDDHH)', MENU_ID INT(11) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыйФыЙ┤ id', CODE VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д эЖ╡ъ│Д ьвЕыеШ', STAT_COUNT INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ь╣┤ьЪ┤эК╕',
PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USER_ID, MENU_ID, TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_TIME_COMPONENTS (YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR), INDEX IDX_TIME_STR (TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_MENU (MENU_ID) ) ENGINE = INNODB DEFAULT CHARSET = UTF8MB4

CREATE TABLE TBL_STAT_MENU_USER_MONTH ( USER_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьЬаьаА id(ы╣ДэЪМьЫРьЭА ip)', TENANT_ID MEDIUMINT(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 , COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВм id', IPADDRESS VARCHAR(15) COMMENT 'ip', YEAR SMALLINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыЕДыПД(YYYY)', MONTH TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЫФ(01 ~ 12)', TIME_CODE INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ы╣аые╕ ы▓ФьЬД ъ▓АьГЙ/ьаХыамьЪй (эШХьЛЭ: YYYYMM)', MENU_ID INT(11) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыйФыЙ┤ id', CODE VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д эЖ╡ъ│Д ьвЕыеШ', STAT_COUNT INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ь╣┤ьЪ┤эК╕',
PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USER_ID, MENU_ID, TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_TIME_COMPONENTS (YEAR, MONTH), INDEX IDX_TIME_STR (TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_MENU (MENU_ID) ) ENGINE = INNODB DEFAULT CHARSET = UTF8MB4

CREATE TABLE TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT ( DEPT_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ы╢АьДЬ id', TENANT_ID MEDIUMINT(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 , COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВм id', YEAR SMALLINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыЕДыПД(YYYY)', MONTH TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЫФ(01 ~ 12)', DAY TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЭ╝(01 ~ 31)', HOUR TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЛЬъ░Д(00 ~ 23)', TIME_CODE INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ы╣аые╕ ы▓ФьЬД ъ▓АьГЙ/ьаХыамьЪй (эШХьЛЭ: YYYYMMDDHH)', MENU_ID INT(11) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыйФыЙ┤ id', CODE VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д эЖ╡ъ│Д ьвЕыеШ', STAT_COUNT INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ь╣┤ьЪ┤эК╕',
PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, DEPT_ID, MENU_ID, TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_TIME_COMPONENTS (YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR), INDEX IDX_TIME_STR (TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_MENU (MENU_ID) ) ENGINE = INNODB DEFAULT CHARSET = UTF8MB4

CREATE TABLE TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT_MONTH ( DEPT_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ы╢АьДЬ id', TENANT_ID MEDIUMINT(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 , COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'эЪМьВм id', YEAR SMALLINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыЕДыПД(YYYY)', MONTH TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ьЫФ(01 ~ 12)', TIME_CODE INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ы╣аые╕ ы▓ФьЬД ъ▓АьГЙ/ьаХыамьЪй (эШХьЛЭ: YYYYMM)', MENU_ID INT(11) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ыйФыЙ┤ id', CODE VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д эЖ╡ъ│Д ьвЕыеШ', STAT_COUNT INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'ьзСъ│Д ь╣┤ьЪ┤эК╕',
PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, DEPT_ID, MENU_ID, TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_TIME_COMPONENTS (YEAR, MONTH), INDEX IDX_TIME_STR (TIME_CODE), INDEX IDX_MENU (MENU_ID) ) ENGINE = INNODB DEFAULT CHARSET = UTF8MB4
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'useSaas' AND TENANT_ID = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (0, 'useSaas', 'эЖб ыкиы░ФьЭ╝ эС╕ьЛЬ ьХМыж╝ эЕМыДМэК╕ьЧР ыФ░ые╕ ъ╡мы╢Д ьВмьЪй ьЧмы╢А', 'N', 'эЖбьДЬы▓ДьЧР эС╕ьЛЬ ьХМыж╝ ы│┤ыВ╝ыХМ эЕМыДМэК╕ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФ ы╢ЩьЧмьДЬ ыДШъ╕╕ьзА ызРьзА ьВмьЪй ьЧмы╢А(default:N)', '2025-05-21 00:00:00', 'эПмэГИ')

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (0, 'externalFileServerUrl', 'ыМАьЪйыЯЙ ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ьЧЕыбЬыУЬ ьДЬы▓Д', 'http://127.0.0.1:8080/', 'ыМАьЪйыЯЙ ь▓иы╢АэММьЭ╝ ыПЩьЛЬ ьЧЕыбЬыУЬэХа ьЩ╕ы╢А ьДЬы▓Д', '2025-05-23 00:00:00', 'ыйФьЭ╝')

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_JOURNAL_FORM ADD COLUMN form_lang MEDIUMINT(5) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT 'ъ╕░ы│╕ьЦСьЛЭьВмьЪйьДдьаХыРЬ ьЦ╕ьЦ┤(defult:1 эХЬъ╡ньЦ┤, 2:ьШБьЦ┤, 3:ьЭ╝ы│╕ьЦ┤, 4:ьдСъ╡ньЦ┤, 5:ы▓аэК╕ыВиьЦ┤, 6:ьЭ╕ыПДыДдьЛЬьХДьЦ┤)', ADD COLUMN form_content2 TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╕░ы│╕ьЦСьЛЭ(ьШБьЦ┤)', ADD COLUMN form_content3 TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╕░ы│╕ьЦСьЛЭ(ьЭ╝ы│╕ьЦ┤)', ADD COLUMN form_content4 TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╕░ы│╕ьЦСьЛЭ(ьдСъ╡ньЦ┤)', ADD COLUMN form_content5 TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╕░ы│╕ьЦСьЛЭ(ы▓аэК╕ыВиьЦ┤)', ADD COLUMN form_content6 TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'ъ╕░ы│╕ьЦСьЛЭ(ьЭ╕ыПДыДдьЛЬьХДьЦ┤)'
